notes: Pass-rate edge (+0.13) comes ENTIRELY from process rigor, not from finding more issues: every baseline miss was either 'no checks.py mechanical pass' (eval-0/eval-1) or 'fact-check cited sources by name without a live-source URL' (eval-2). The skill's value here is disciplined, repeatable method.

UNDERSTATED SKILL GAP (top iteration target): in eval-1 the baseline surfaced two Blocker-class integrity issues — a broken quiz cross-reference (lesson->quiz question #) and a dead lab starter-code path — that the with_skill run MISSED. The rubric steered the skilled run toward qualitative depth/provider analysis; neither checks.py nor the rubric explicitly hunts internal-reference integrity. No assertion tests blocker recall, so the benchmark does not penalize this. Fix: add cross-reference / dead-path / resource-URL-liveness checks (script + rubric).

REAL SKILL WIN (also uncaptured by assertions): in eval-2 the with_skill run caught a Major factual error at 04-structured-outputs.ts:88 ('limits are the same' is stale — OpenAI added minimum/maxLength/pattern etc. in 2025) that the baseline missed and explicitly endorsed as correct. The live-doc fact-check discipline paid off on the hardest standard.

Cost profile: with_skill averaged ~400s vs ~241s baseline (+160s) from live fact-checking + reading the exemplar/reference; tokens were actually LOWER (212k vs 249k), so the skill trades wall-time for accuracy without a token penalty.

Many assertions are non-discriminating (report-exists, file:line-cited, no-content-edit, chat-summary) — they pass in both configs. The only differentiating assertions are 'ran checks.py' and 'cited a live source'. Future evals should add discriminating assertions (e.g., blocker/integrity recall) to measure what actually separates the skill.

Watch for mild over-reach: on the exemplar (eval-0) the with_skill run raised 3 Minor precision items vs the baseline's 1 soft note. All were labeled Minor/Polish (no fabricated Blocker/Major, so the anti-nitpick rule held), but confirm in review these are genuine, not manufactured to look thorough.
